LanguageData.VAEI_Distracted.description: 由於注意力分散的特質，注意力嚴重分散，導致工作速度大大降低。
LanguageData.VAEI_Distracted.label: 愣
LanguageData.VAEI_Focused.description: 精神高度集中在手邊的任務，大大提高了工作效率。
LanguageData.VAEI_Focused.label: 專注的
LanguageData.VAEI_JoinedCult.label: 加入邪教
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.description: This pawn is experiencing mood swings, rapidly shifting between feelings of joy and sadness.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.label: 情緒波動
LanguageData.VAEI_SacrificialHediff.description: 一種犧牲精神狀態，將在成功逮捕或死亡後結束。
LanguageData.VAEI_SacrificialHediff.label: 犧牲精神狀態
